summary: Student productivity app with homepage showing days left to end of month, targets/reminders displayed on homepage, calendar/timer features, bottom navigation bar, and motivational target widget.
architectural_notes: Bottom navigation bar (Subject, Question, Reminder, Target, Home) must persist across all pages
known_issues: Build has failed multiple times due to AI/server errors; retrying

existing_features.title: Display a 'Days Left to End of Month' countdown banner at the very top of the homepage (Dashboard). Calculate the number of days remaining in the current calendar month and show it prominently (e.g., '12 days left in this month').

On the homepage (Dashboard), show a section that lists the user's upcoming reminders and active targets so they are immediately visible without navigating away. Pull data from existing localStorage reminders and targets. Show title, deadline/time, and a short status indicator for each item.
Add a calendar-clock icon button in the top-right area of the homepage header, positioned beside the existing message icon. Tapping this icon navigates the user to a new Timer/Countdown page.

Create a new Timer/Countdown page reachable from the calendar-clock icon. The page must: (1) Allow adding a new timer with a 'Start' date field (month + day) and an 'End' date field (year + month + day). (2) After saving, display a live countdown showing months, days, hours, and minutes remaining until the End date in large, prominent text. (3) Support multiple simultaneous timers listed on the page. (4) Each timer entry shows its label/end-date and live countdown. (5) Provide a delete option for each timer.

Add a persistent bottom navigation bar that is visible on every page of the app. The bar must contain five buttons with icons and labels: Home, Subject, Question, Reminder, and Target. Each button navigates to its corresponding page. The bar must remain fixed at the bottom of the screen and not be hidden by page content.

Add a 'Target 🎯 100%' motivational widget on the homepage (Dashboard). Style it with a bold, winner/champion aesthetic — use gold/trophy colors, celebratory typography, and an energetic design to keep students motivated. Show the user's current overall target completion percentage and a message encouraging them to reach 100%.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show days left to end of month at top of homepage
Display added targets and reminders on homepage for easy visibility
Add calendar clock icon in top right corner (beside message icon) that opens a timer/countdown page
Timer page: add timer with start (month/day) and end (year/month/day) fields, shows countdown in large format (months/days/hrs/min), supports multiple timers
Persistent bottom navigation bar with Subject, Question, Reminder, Target, and Home buttons visible on every page
Add motivational 'Target 🎯 100%' widget on home screen with attractive winner-style design
